caption: In a large indoor hall with a high ceiling and recessed lighting, several people are practicing martial arts on a blue carpeted floor. Most participants wear traditional white uniforms, while one person is dressed in a bright blue outfit and another in a black sleeveless top and pants. A person in red clothing stands further back in the background. Throughout the sequence, the individuals engage in synchronized movements, shifting their stances and extending their arms in fluid motions. The person in blue remains a central figure, moving their arms and rotating their body. As the sequence progresses, the practitioners shift their weight and change positions, with the person in the black outfit moving towards the right side of the frame. A crowd of spectators is visible in the distant background, seated and watching the demonstration. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
